title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Udemy India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Udemy India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Udemy India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Udemy India:
Udemy India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Udemy India!
